statement.p: Fill in the blanks with algebraic expressions that make the equation true. You may not use 0 or 1 in any of the blank spaces. An example is \mathord{?} + \mathord{?} = 8x \text{,} where one possible answer is 3x + 5x = 8x \text{.} There are infinitely many correct answers to this problem. Be creative. After finding a correct answer, see if you can come up with a different answer that is also correct.

li.p: Think about adding like terms. One possibility is: {-xy} + {-8xy} = {-9xy}\text{.}
Think about adding like terms. One possibility is: {-13x^{25}y^{8}} + {-6x^{25}y^{8}} = {-19x^{25}y^{8}}\text{.}
Think about multiplying exponents. One possibility is: 5 \cdot {x^{20}} \cdot {x^{10}} \cdot {y^{30}} \cdot {y^{20}} = {5x^{30}y^{50}}\text{.}
